desc: C002 layer 1: force strategy scene setup (FUN_0054e570 mode 2) even when scene-state gate 0x358382 is already 2. Without this, autologin world entry skips unit-list panel widget 0x67 creation because the gate is pre-set to 2.
verified: live probe 2026-06-23: gate_358382=2, scene_mode=2, cmdRowCount=0, catGate=0, 0x0b01 absent. Disasm confirms 0x4b6b53 je 0x4b6b6e skips FUN_0054e570 when gate==2.

patches.note: je +0x19 (skip setup if gate==2) -> jmp +0 (always run setup+cleanup). 2-byte same-length patch.
